news.t: Amplify ETFs Launches Amplify Municipal CEF High Income ETF (YYYM)

overview.description: The Amplify Municipal CEF High Income ETF (YYYM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is a fund-of-funds, tracking a fundamentally weighted index of 30 US-listed municipal bond (CEFs) closed-end funds. Security selection combines yield, discount to NAV, and trading volume. YYYM was launched on Mar 10, 2026 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
infoTable: Nasdaq Municipal Bond CEF High Income Index

data.title: Amplify ETFs Launches Amplify Municipal CEF High Income ETF (YYYM)
data.text: CHICAGO, March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Amplify ETFs , a leading provider of breakthrough ETF solutions, today announced the launch of the Amplify Municipal CEF High Income ETF (YYYM), which is de...
